messages.text:
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta!
Why don't eggs tell jokes? They'd crack each other up!
please give me a basic 2d player movement script

**2D Player Movement Script**
```csharp
using System;

public class PlayerMovement```
**Example Use Case:**

Create a new game object to hold the player movement script.
Set up input keys for movement (W, A, S, D).
Call `Update` method on the player object in your game loop.
Use `GetPosition` method to update the player's position on the screen.

who was the 45th president of the United States?

micro_summary: Donald Trump was the 45th president of the United States. Currently, the project is focused on finalizing the initial draft of the presidential biography.
